member.name: T:Telegrator.Hosting.Web.WebhookerOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for Telegram bot behavior and execution settings. Controls various aspects of bot operation including concurrency, routing, webhook receiving, and execution policies.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Hosting.Web.WebhookerOptions.WebhookUri
member.summary: Gets or sets HTTPS URL to send updates to. Use an empty string to remove webhook integration

member.name: P:Telegrator.Hosting.Web.WebhookerOptions.SecretToken
member.summary: A secret token to be sent in a header “X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token” in every webhook request, 1-256 characters. Only characters A-Z, a-z, 0-9, _ and - are allowed. The header is useful to ensure that the request comes from a webhook set by you.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Hosting.Web.WebhookerOptions.MaxConnections
member.summary: The maximum allowed number of simultaneous HTTPS connections to the webhook for update delivery, 1-100. Defaults to 40. Use lower values to limit the load on your bot's server, and higher values to increase your bot's throughput.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Hosting.Web.WebhookerOptions.DropPendingUpdates
member.summary: Pass true to drop all pending updates

member.name: T:Telegrator.Mediation.HostedUpdateWebhooker
member.summary: Service for receiving updates for Hosted telegram bots via Webhooks

member.name: M:Telegrator.Mediation.HostedUpdateWebhooker.RemapWebhook(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Routing.IEndpointRouteBuilder,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Allows to remap receiving webhook endpoint and map new route to webhost.

member.name: M:Telegrator.Mediation.HostedUpdateWebhooker.MapWebhook(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Routing.IEndpointRouteBuilder)
member.summary: Maps bot webhook to application builder

member.name: T:Telegrator.ServicesCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Contains extensions for Provides method to configure Telegram Bot WebHost

member.name: M:Telegrator.ServicesCollectionExtensions.AddTelegratorWeb(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,Telegrator.TelegratorOptions,Telegrator.Core.IHandlersCollection)
member.summary: Replaces TelegramBotWebHostBuilder. Configures DI, options, and handlers.

member.name: M:Telegrator.ServicesCollectionExtensions.AddTelegratorWeb(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,Telegrator.TelegratorOptions,Telegrator.Core.IHandlersCollection,System.Action{Telegrator.Hosting.ITelegramBotHostBuilder})
member.summary: Replaces TelegramBotWebHostBuilder. Configures DI, options, and handlers.
Replaces TelegramBotWebHostBuilder. Configures DI, options, and handlers.

member.name: T:Telegrator.TelegramBotHostExtensions
member.summary: Provides useful methods to adjust Telegram bot Host

member.name: M:Telegrator.TelegramBotHostExtensions.TryFindWebhooker(System.IServiceProvider,Telegrator.Mediation.HostedUpdateWebhooker@)
member.summary: Searchs for hosted service inside hosts services

member.name: M:Telegrator.TelegramBotHostExtensions.UseTelegratorWeb``1(``0,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Replaces the initialization logic from TelegramBotWebHost constructor. Initializes the bot and logs handlers on application startup.

member.name: M:Telegrator.TelegramBotHostExtensions.RemapWebhook``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Allows to remap receiving webhook endpoint and map new route to webhost.

member.name: M:Telegrator.TelegramBotHostExtensions.AddTelegramWebhook(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers service with to receive updates using webhook
